overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking toward the National Basilica of the Sacred Heart in Koekelberg. The character traverses from a dirt path through a grassy area onto a large paved plaza surrounding the historic basilica, with the camera smoothly following from behind.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the basilica with trees flanking both sides

entered.detail: large stone basilica with green copper dome and twin towers visible in the distance
dense line of tall evergreen trees forming the left boundary of the approach
dense line of tall evergreen trees forming the right boundary of the approach
unpaved dirt and grass path leading toward the basilica
grassy areas with wildflowers flanking the dirt path on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through a grassy area flanked by tall evergreen trees on both sides, approaching the massive basilica with its distinctive green dome visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved plaza in front of basilica

events.description: transitions from dirt path onto paved asphalt plaza surface
character steps onto marked pedestrian crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide paved plaza toward the basilica's main entrance steps

entered.detail: expansive paved stone plaza surrounding the basilica
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
elevated stone terrace and staircase leading to the basilica entrance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dirt path onto a wide paved plaza, crossing marked pedestrian lines as the basilica looms larger ahead with its grand stone staircase and Art Deco facade becoming more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with basilica on left side

events.description: character turns right to walk along the side of the basilica plaza
distant urban buildings become visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the plaza perimeter with the basilica now on the left side

entered.detail: cluster of historic buildings with red tiled roofs visible in the distance
line of leafy green trees marking the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and walks along the expansive paved plaza, with the basilica now dominating the left side of the frame while distant red-roofed buildings and leafy trees appear on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: basilica side approach with perimeter fence

events.description: metal fence and stone gate pillars become prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the paved area beside the basilica perimeter fence

entered.detail: black metal fence with stone pillars marking the basilica grounds boundary
large stone pillars supporting the metal fence gates

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a metal perimeter fence and stone gate pillars at the basilica's boundary, with the massive stone building filling the left side of the frame and architectural details of the side facade becoming clearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded natural path toward the imposing architectural scale of the National Basilica of the Sacred Heart. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through a grassy area flanked by tall evergreen trees, with the basilica's green dome appearing as a distant landmark. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from dirt to a wide paved plaza, crossing pedestrian lines as the grand stone staircase and Art Deco facade loom larger in the frame. The scene then expands as the character turns right across the open plaza, leaving the basilica to dominate the left side of the view while red-roofed buildings and leafy trees emerge on the distant right horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character alongside a metal perimeter fence and stone gate pillars, bringing the massive stone facade and its intricate architectural details into sharp focus.
